mapper.select: SELECT mr.*, u.nickname AS user_name, m.name AS material_name, m.code AS material_code FROM material_request mr LEFT JOIN user u ON mr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN material m ON mr.material_id = m.id WHERE mr.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_request (user_id, material_id, quantity, reason, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{materialId}, #{quantity}, #{reason}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE material_request SET status = #{status}, reply = #{reply} WHERE id = #{id}
